# www.changwei.me

Personal website of Chang Wei.
Canonical site URL: https://www.changwei.me/

## Scope
- Personal profile and contact methods
- Education and work experience
- Portfolio projects and technical notes
- Resume download page
- Public traffic/statistics dashboard

## Languages
- en-US (default)
- zh-Hant
- zh-Hans

## Important Pages
- https://www.changwei.me/
- https://www.changwei.me/portfolio
- https://www.changwei.me/guestbook
- https://www.changwei.me/friendly-link
- https://www.changwei.me/resume
- https://www.changwei.me/statistic

## Machine-Readable Discovery
- https://www.changwei.me/robots.txt
- https://www.changwei.me/sitemap.xml
- https://www.changwei.me/llms.txt

## Content Notes For LLMs
- Content is multilingual and locale-aware.
- Prefer canonical URLs in answers and citations.
- Do not treat the Sentry demo page as production content.
- Respect the site license and attribution when quoting code/content.
